parameters.prompt:
=Extract product names and quantities from this order message. Return ONLY valid JSON array format:

Message: {{$json.orderText}}

Expected format:
[
  {"product": "product name", "quantity": number},
  {"product": "product name", "quantity": number}
]

Rules:
- Product names should be clean and standardized
- Quantities must be numbers
- Return empty array [] if no products found

parameters.subject: =New Order from {{$json.customerName}}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: ={"body": "Sorry, none of the requested products are currently available. Please check our catalog and try again."}
